error_signature: form validation triggers on modal open
title: Form validation triggers unexpectedly on modal open
symptom: When opening a modal from a button inside a form container, validation error messages appear on top of the modal.
applies_when: Using a button inside a form container
Modal is triggered on button click
not_this_if: Button is explicitly set as a submit button
root_cause: The button inside the form container may be treated as a submit button due to its context, causing the form validation to trigger when the modal opens, even if the button is not intended to submit the form.
fix_steps: Change the button type from 'Text' to 'Button'
Ensure the button does not have a submit action
Test the modal opening again to confirm the issue is resolved
agent_instruction: Change the button type to 'Button' to prevent form validation on modal open.
